svg.text: AML Red Flags — Quantum Era Typologies

g.text: • Quantum-ambiguous movement: dormant P2PK address + full balance movement — cannot distinguish theft from migration without off-chain evidence
• Migration-cover layering: dormant address migrates then immediately uses mixer/bridge — timing with BIP-361 activation period is key indicator
• HNDL data exposure: AML intelligence systems using pre-NIST encryption — data collected today within quantum decryption window
• Evidence contestability: STRs filed without off-chain corroboration — ECDSA signatures alone insufficient for post-2029 criminal proceedings
• Strategic ambiguity defense: defendants claiming "quantum attacker forged my signature" — pre-empt with behavioral pattern documentation
Frameworks: ACAMS 7.1 · FATF R.20/R.29 · NIST FIPS 203/205 · Lei 9.613 Art. 10 · NSM-10 (USA)

svg.text: Author: Phelipe Agnelli — AML & Blockchain Forensics · Sources: Federal Reserve FEDS 2025-093 · BIP-361 · PACTs/Paradigm · AmericanFortress · Google Quantum AI · Project Eleven · NIST FIPS 205 · AML-IR-2026-009
